sources.title: Prompt Engineering Market Size, Industry Share | Forecast, 2026-2034
claims_supported: Global prompt engineering market valued at $505.43M in 2025
Market projected to grow from $673.6M in 2026 to $6,703.84M by 2034
CAGR of 33.27% during forecast period
sources.notes: Tier-1 market research firm. Used for primary market sizing.

sources.title: Prompt Engineering Market Size To Reach $2.06Bn By 2030
claims_supported: Prompt engineering market to reach $2.06B by 2030
CAGR of 32.8% from 2024 to 2030
sources.notes: Independent confirmation of 32-33% CAGR range from a second Tier-1 research firm.

sources.title: 2026 AI Business Predictions — Global AI Jobs Barometer
claims_supported: 56% wage premium for AI skills in 2025, doubled from 25% the prior year
Analysis based on close to 1 billion job ads
AI skills now represent the largest single-year wage premium increase in tech history
sources.notes: PwC Global AI Jobs Barometer is the gold-standard wage premium study. Directly supports the 56% premium claim.

sources.title: Is Prompt Engineering a Real Career in 2026? Job Demand and Salary Data
claims_supported: Prompt engineering job demand grew +135.8% in 2025
Median salary $126,000/yr in 2026
Senior roles $170K-$220K at Big Tech
Frontier lab roles (Anthropic, OpenAI) exceed $300K total compensation
sources.notes: Specialist career research site for prompt engineering. Salary data corroborated by Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter, and Coursera sources.

sources.title: What is a Forward Deployed Engineer: The AI Role OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Are Hiring in 2026
claims_supported: Forward Deployed Engineers are the defining enterprise AI role in 2026
OpenAI formalized 'The Deployment Company' on May 11, 2026 with $4B+ raised
FDE roles require production prompt engineering, agent development, and evaluation frameworks
sources.notes: Published May 20, 2026 — highly current. Directly confirms the OpenAI Deployment Company trigger event.

sources.title: Prompt Engineering Statistics 2026: Surprising Growth
claims_supported: LinkedIn reported 250% increase in prompt engineering job postings year-over-year
72,000 prompt engineering positions globally by 2025
Market growing at 32.10% CAGR
sources.notes: Aggregates LinkedIn, industry survey, and market research data. Cross-check LinkedIn stat against Coursera career guide.

sources.title: Best Prompt Engineering Tools in 2026 (Reviewed)
claims_supported: Braintrust is a top-ranked LLM evaluation and prompt engineering platform in 2026
$36M Series A raised
Used by enterprise teams at Stripe, Vercel, and comparable accounts
sources.notes: Primary source on the prompt engineering tooling landscape. Braintrust is both publisher and subject — treat competitive claims about other platforms with caution.

sources.title: Prompt Engineering Jobs: Your 2026 Career Guide
claims_supported: Entry-level roles earn $90,000-$125,000 in 2026
Vanderbilt/Coursera Prompt Engineering Specialization cited as industry gold standard
Anthropic Academy interactive certification widely cited by employers
sources.notes: Coursera career guides are based on aggregated platform and employer data. Highly credible for salary ranges and certification value.

sources.title: The Best Prompt Engineering Courses to Take in 2026
claims_supported: DeepLearning.AI free short courses (1-2 hours) are the best free prompt engineering resources
Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification costs $200 exam fee
Portfolio work outperforms certifications for employer evaluation
sources.notes: DataCamp is a credible technical education publisher. Used for education landscape and certification analysis.

sources.title: Prompt Engineering
claims_supported: Chain-of-thought prompting origin: Google Brain 2022 paper
ChatGPT November 30, 2022 launch as founding market trigger
58 distinct prompting techniques catalogued by 2024
sources.notes: Used for historical timeline milestones only. Wikipedia sources are cross-checked against primary papers for key dates.

unverified_claims.source_note: Attributed to Microsoft Work Trend Index 2025 — URL not directly retrieved, cited as [unverified]
unverified_claims.risk: low — directionally consistent with other workforce AI adoption surveys

unverified_claims.claim: Enterprise AI spending projected at $731B in 2026
unverified_claims.source_note: Attributed to IDC — figure cited widely but direct IDC report URL not retrieved in this research session
unverified_claims.risk: low — multiple secondary sources cite this IDC figure

unverified_claims.claim: 68% of Fortune 500 companies have dedicated AI engineer headcount in 2026
unverified_claims.source_note: Cited in multiple career guides without a primary source link — [unverified]
unverified_claims.risk: medium — directionally plausible but exact percentage should be verified before use in published claims
